checks.description: When the counter reaches its maximum value (4'd11) while valid_count remains asserted, the next observed output must wrap to 0 within a conservative observation window.
checks.pass_condition: If out == 4'd11 and valid_count == 1, then within the next two clock cycles out must be 4'b0000 and not X or Z.
checks.trigger_condition: out equals 4'd11 while valid_count is high

checks.description: When valid_count is asserted, the counter output must eventually change to reflect counting progress.
checks.pass_condition: If valid_count == 1, then out must change (increment modulo 12) within at most two clock cycles, unless it is already at the maximum value where wrap‑around is expected.
checks.trigger_condition: valid_count transitions high or remains high
